name: PARK AEROSPACE CORP
summary: Park Aerospace Corp. develops and manufactures advanced composite materials, film adhesives, and lightning strike protection materials for global aerospace markets. Products include thermoset prepregs using proprietary resin formulations combined with various reinforcements. The company also designs and fabricates composite structures, assemblies, and low-volume tooling. It serves jet engine manufacturers, commercial and military aircraft OEMs, UAV producers, and rocket motor customers. Manufacturing and R&D are located in Newton, Kansas.
